diagrams.title: ARM Register Classification (AAPCS)
diagrams.description: Shows how registers R0-R15 are categorized according to ARM Architecture Procedure Call Standard
diagrams.purpose: Understand register roles for function calls

diagrams.title: Stack Frame Layout
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a typical function's stack frame in ARM
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory layout during function calls

diagrams.title: Function Call Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of control during BL instruction and return
elements: 4. Return: MOV PC, LR or POP {PC}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize control transfer in function calls

diagrams.title: Leaf vs Non-Leaf Function Execution
diagrams.description: Comparison of return mechanisms between leaf and non-leaf functions
elements: Leaf: BL → execute → MOV PC, LR
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate return mechanisms based on function type
